title: Advances and Challenges in Pediatric and Childhood Cancers.
author_string: Hawkins, Cynthia, Pfister, Stefan, Jones, David T W, Shah, Nirali N, Gilbertson, Richard J et al.
abstract: As we continue to learn about the unique biology of pediatric and childhood cancers and as new therapies are being developed, we asked some experts to highlight the most notable advances in our understanding of these diseases and in the development of treatments in the past decade, and to point out current challenges that still need to be addressed.
